name: Community-Associated MRSA (caMRSA)
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with community-associated methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) infections based on laboratory culture results rather than diagnosis codes. The phenotype specifically targets community-acquired cases across all age groups.
prompt: Find all patients aged 0 to 89 years who have positive laboratory culture results for methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus from community-acquired infections.

required_codes.display: Methicillin resistant Staphylococcus aureus [Presence] in Specimen by Organism specific culture
Methicillin resistant Staphylococcus aureus DNA [Presence] in Specimen by NAA with probe detection
